title: Opening for Software Engineer at AgroStar

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at AgroStar
jsonLd.description:
AgroStar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AgroStar:
AgroStar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar!
